name: jotai
summary: Primitive and flexible state management for React based on atomic state units.

story.problem: Redux has too much boilerplate. Context re-renders everything. Zustand is great but stores are global objects — you can't easily create per-component or per-instance state that still works across the tree. You want something simpler that feels like useState but works globally.
story.mental_model: Jotai models state as atoms — tiny independent units, like useState but shared. Any component can read or write any atom. Atoms can derive from other atoms (like computed properties). The React tree only re-renders where the atom is actually used.
story.when_to_use: React apps needing shared state without prop drilling, derived/computed state that updates automatically, fine-grained re-render control, per-route or per-feature isolated state.
story.when_not_to_use: Non-React environments (Jotai is React-only). Complex state machines (use XState). Apps already committed to Redux with large middleware ecosystems.

alternatives.name: zustand
alternatives.reason: Store-based rather than atom-based, slightly simpler for flat state, easier devtools.

alternatives.name: recoil
alternatives.reason: Facebook's atom model, similar concept but larger bundle and less maintained.

alternatives.name: valtio
alternatives.reason: Proxy-based reactive state, mutable-style mutations, very simple API.

alternatives.name: redux
alternatives.reason: Battle-tested, excellent devtools, best for very large apps with complex state logic.

nodes.label: jotai
nodes.summary: Import atom, useAtom, useAtomValue, useSetAtom from 'jotai'.

nodes.label: atom(initialValue)
nodes.summary: Create an atom: `const countAtom = atom(0)`. Can be number, object, array, or derived.

nodes.label: useAtom(atom)
nodes.summary: Like useState but global: `const [count, setCount] = useAtom(countAtom)`. Re-renders only this component.

nodes.label: useAtomValue(atom)
nodes.summary: Read-only hook. Doesn't trigger re-render when atom is written to but value unchanged.

nodes.label: useSetAtom(atom)
nodes.summary: Write-only hook. Doesn't subscribe to value changes — no re-render on read.

nodes.label: Derived atoms
nodes.summary: `atom(get => get(a) + get(b))` — computed value. Re-computes when dependencies change.

nodes.label: Async atoms
nodes.summary: `atom(async (get) => fetch(...))` — suspense-compatible async data. Works with React Suspense.

nodes.label: Provider (optional)
nodes.summary: Wrap subtree to scope atoms: `<Provider>`. Without it, atoms use a global default store.

tasks.title: Replace useState with a shared atom

steps.label: Define atom
Use in components
Base atoms
steps.code:
const priceAtom = atom(100)
const quantityAtom = atom(3)

steps.label: Derived
steps.code:
const totalAtom = atom(get => get(priceAtom) * get(quantityAtom))
// totalAtom updates automatically when price or quantity changes

steps.label: Use
